note: Immutable scope. New ideas go to LEDGER.open_questions, not into code, until promoted into a step by Opus. Order is dependency-resolved, not Top-20 rank order.

phases.goal: Stand up the locked design tokens and the shared component kit so every later page composes from them.
phases.unlocks: All feature work; the dual-mode spine.

steps.title: Port DESIGN-CONTRACT tokens into the Astro app as a theme layer (data-theme ready)
steps.why: One source for colour/type/spacing; enables the user theme slider.
accept: all tokens are CSS vars under a theme scope
no colour/font literals outside the token layer
Ivory-Grey/Almanac grounds, Cream card, muted-main/accent split present

steps.title: Build the standardized finding-first analysis card component
steps.why: One archetype fixes twelve market pages; the corpus's worst inconsistency.
accept: single H/M/L confidence pill (hover for nuance)

steps.title: Confidence chip + source-tier hook
steps.why: Unify HIGH/sentence/blank chaos into one pill linked to a tier explainer.

steps.title: Reality badge + status tokens (Realized/Anticipated/Latent) + reality filter
steps.why: Separate realized fact from forward risk everywhere (owner-approved model).
accept: badge renders on cards + causal edges

steps.title: Honest freshness banner — kill the hardcoded May-29 stamp
steps.why: A stale 'Live' date destroys the credibility the product projects.
accept: date computed from real data timestamps or labelled 'Last reviewed'

steps.title: Scaffold shared parts: cascade rail, situation strip, trust badges, band, report surface
steps.why: Reusable parts the registry depends on; templated once.
accept: each part is a reusable component
situation strip separates realized vs latent
report surface uses the Almanac ground

steps.title: CI gates + preview workflow (token-lint, trace-grep, dual-mode assertion)
steps.why: Anti-drift for a multi-model build; preview-not-live discipline.
accept: local preview documented; deploy only on phase approval

phases.goal: Ship the persistent, remembered toggle; every page renders meaningfully in both modes.

steps.title: Persistent, remembered Simple/Analyst toggle (top-right, localStorage)
steps.why: The keystone decision resolving expert-vs-newcomer across all routes.

steps.title: Dual-mode contract + drill-down: Simple=answer, Analyst=answer+apparatus+trade
steps.why: Analyst must add depth, not just reformat (owner feedback).
accept: Analyst exposes source chains/positioning/registries Simple hides
both modes have an expand/drill-down to deeper detail

phases.goal: Make the depth legible to the newcomer without weakening the analyst view.

steps.title: Wire the 209-term glossary as inline tooltips on first use
steps.why: Hardest comprehension barrier; the fix already ships in the data.

steps.title: TL;DR + key-asymmetry band on every analysis page
steps.why: Thesis blocks exist but are long and below the fold.

steps.title: Collapsible thesis (TL;DR → expandable detail)
steps.why: Same content, two reading speeds.

steps.title: Source-tier + confidence explainer (one-time, dismissible)
steps.why: A genuine strength shown without explanation.

steps.title: Outcome-renamed nav (plain glosses in Simple, precise nouns in Analyst)
steps.why: Transmission/Exposure/Connections are cold to newcomers.

phases.goal: Make the homepage and About convert a cold visitor and an LP.

steps.title: Rewrite the homepage hero for a cold non-specialist
steps.why: 'Sensitivity to volatility.' is a pun a newcomer can't parse.
accept: leads with concrete outcome + worked example

steps.title: Demote 'Coming soon' to one honest roadmap line
steps.why: 3-of-4 'coming soon' signals an unfinished product on a billboard.
accept: single roadmap line; live corpus foregrounded

steps.title: Promote the cascade diagram into the interactive nav spine
steps.why: The site's mental model, currently decorative.
accept: 'where am I / next' on analysis pages

steps.title: Make About the canonical #methodology anchor (show, don't tell)
steps.why: The confidence system is the deepest credibility asset.
accept: T1/T2/T3 + attribution shown with a worked example

steps.title: Verify freshness fix renders honestly site-wide
steps.why: Close the Tier-1 credibility defect everywhere.
accept: no page shows a stale 'Live' date

phases.goal: Roll the standardized card + dual-mode + mobile-safe tables across all 12 sections.
phases.unlocks: The bulk of the analysis corpus.

steps.title: Apply the standardized card across the 12 market pages
steps.why: One archetype, twelve pages.
accept: every market page uses the card

steps.title: Make wide tables mobile-safe (summary band + sticky first column)
steps.why: 19x9 tables scroll-clip on the device an LP opens links on.

steps.title: Add charts/maps where the audit flagged them
steps.why: Density is all-text; visuals carry the story.
accept: price/correlation charts + geographic maps where flagged

steps.title: Scenario-state as a situation section (realized vs latent separated)
steps.why: Promote scenario state out of global chrome into its own clear section.

phases.goal: Turn the most compelling, most under-designed pages into the showcase.

steps.title: Connections: render themes + 9 edges as a navigable causal graph
steps.why: The intellectual core, currently walls of text.

steps.title: Exposure: winners/losers world map + sortable matrix
steps.why: The most LP-legible content, presented as text profiles today.

steps.title: Who Profits: channel→beneficiary→phase/vehicle cards; name the blank groups
steps.why: Most commercial content in its weakest packaging; 8 blank titles is a hard defect.

steps.title: Cascade rail everywhere + breadcrumbs + templated related-sections footer
steps.why: Universalize the spine and cross-navigation.

phases.goal: Make the densest layer welcoming and close the credibility punch-list.
phases.unlocks: Program done (audit Top-20 as a checklist).

steps.title: Dashboard: Simple-default 'War Room briefing' tab + SSR/static fallback
steps.why: The plain-English on-ramp already exists in the data; client-only shell is empty without JS.
accept: War Room briefing is the Simple landing

steps.title: Gloss dashboard codes inline (B/C/U, BDA, operations)
steps.why: Most jargon-dense surface, almost none glossed.
accept: codes spelled out / glossed on first use

steps.title: Human /signals board (rendered preview + schema + copy-endpoint)
steps.why: Raw JSON is hostile to the curious LP.

steps.title: Reconcile contradictory anchor figures [research lane]
steps.why: Urea 36% vs 30-40%; defense $2.887tn vs $2.718tn undermine rigor.
accept: one canonical figure each + a single reconciliation note
edited in canonical JSON then regenerated

steps.title: Unify the conflict's five names + two day-counts
steps.why: The glossary alone carries five names.
accept: one canonical name + duration; aliases mapped

steps.title: Consistency QA close-out (full-site smoke + Top-20 checklist)
steps.why: Program definition-of-done.
accept: every route loads, no console errors
